languages.text: {n}Лишь невероятным усилием воли вы берете себя в руки. Ярость угасает, отступая куда-то вглубь сознания, и оставляет после себя липкий страх, невыносимое желание бежать подальше — и невозможность этого сделать.{/n}

{n}By willpower alone, you pull yourself together. The fury fades, sinking into the depths of your mind, leaving a lingering terror, an urge to flee, and the knowledge that such escape is impossible.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Лишь невероятным усилием воли вы берете себя в руки. Ярость угасает, отступая куда-то вглубь сознания, и оставляет после себя липкий страх, невыносимое желание бежать подальше — и невозможность этого сделать.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}By willpower alone, you steady yourself. The fury fades, sinking into the depths of your mind, leaving a trail of slick terror, an urge to flee, and the knowledge that such escape is impossible.{/n}

{n}By willpower alone, you pull yourself together. The fury fades, sinking into the depths of your mind, leaving a lingering terror, an urge to flee, and the knowledge that such escape is impossible.{/n}

{n}With effort, you suppress the sudden flare of anger and quickly realise that something else lay hidden behind it — blood-chilling terror, the urge to flee, and the knowledge that such escape was impossible.{/n}

{n}By willpower alone, you steady yourself. The fury fades, sinking into the depths of your mind, leaving a trail of slick terror, an urge to flee, and the knowledge that such escape is impossible.{/n}

{n}By willpower alone, you pull yourself together. The fury fades, sinking into the depths of your mind, leaving a lingering terror, an urge to flee, and the knowledge that such escape is impossible.{/n}

languages.text: {n}懸命に込み上げた怒りを押し殺し、その背後に別のものが潜んでいるとすぐに気づく――血の気が引くような恐怖、逃げ出したい衝動、そして逃げ場はないという確信だ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With effort, you suppress the sudden flare of anger and quickly realise that something else lay hidden behind it — blood-chilling terror, the urge to flee, and the knowledge that such escape was impossible.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}懸命に込み上げた怒りを押し殺し、その背後に別のものが潜んでいるとすぐに気づく――血の気が引くような恐怖、逃げ出したい衝動、そして逃げ場はないという確信だ。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Par la seule force de votre volonté, vous parvenez à vous ressaisir. La fureur s'estompe et reflue dans les profondeurs de votre esprit, laissant dans son sillage une terreur lancinante, un désir impérieux de prendre la fuite et la certitude qu'une telle échappatoire est impossible.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}By willpower alone, you pull yourself together. The fury fades, sinking into the depths of your mind, leaving a lingering terror, an urge to flee, and the knowledge that such escape is impossible.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Par la seule force de votre volonté, vous parvenez à vous ressaisir. La fureur s'estompe et reflue dans les profondeurs de votre esprit, laissant dans son sillage une terreur lancinante, un désir impérieux de prendre la fuite et la certitude qu'une telle échappatoire est impossible.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İrade gücünle kendini toparlıyorsun. Öfke azalıyor, zihninin derinliklerine çöküyor. Geriye kalıcı bir dehşet, kaçma arzusu ve böyle bir kaçışın imkânsız olduğu bilgisi kalıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}By willpower alone, you pull yourself together. The fury fades, sinking into the depths of your mind, leaving a lingering terror, an urge to flee, and the knowledge that such escape is impossible.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}İrade gücünle kendini toparlıyorsun. Öfke azalıyor, zihninin derinliklerine çöküyor. Geriye kalıcı bir dehşet, kaçma arzusu ve böyle bir kaçışın imkânsız olduğu bilgisi kalıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Es gelingt dir durch schiere Willenskraft, dich zu beherrschen. Die Wut zieht sich in die Tiefen deines Verstandes zurück und hinterlässt einen nachklingenden Schrecken, den Drang, zu fliehen und das Wissen, dass es kein Entkommen gibt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}By willpower alone, you pull yourself together. The fury fades, sinking into the depths of your mind, leaving a lingering terror, an urge to flee, and the knowledge that such escape is impossible.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Es gelingt dir durch schiere Willenskraft, dich zu beherrschen. Die Wut zieht sich in die Tiefen deines Verstandes zurück und hinterlässt einen nachklingenden Schrecken, den Drang, zu fliehen und das Wissen, dass es kein Entkommen gibt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Logras controlarte haciendo acopio de toda tu voluntad. La furia remite, hundiéndose en lo más profundo de tu mente y dejando tras de sí un terror vestigial, la necesidad de huir y la certeza de que no hay escapatoria.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}By willpower alone, you pull yourself together. The fury fades, sinking into the depths of your mind, leaving a lingering terror, an urge to flee, and the knowledge that such escape is impossible.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Logras controlarte haciendo acopio de toda tu voluntad. La furia remite, hundiéndose en lo más profundo de tu mente y dejando tras de sí un terror vestigial, la necesidad de huir y la certeza de que no hay escapatoria.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你仅凭意志勉强稳住了自己。怒火渐渐退去，沉入意识深处，只留下挥之不去的恐惧、想拔腿就跑的冲动，以及知晓自己无处可逃的绝望。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}By willpower alone, you pull yourself together. The fury fades, sinking into the depths of your mind, leaving a lingering terror, an urge to flee, and the knowledge that such escape is impossible.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你仅凭意志勉强稳住了自己。怒火渐渐退去，沉入意识深处，只留下挥之不去的恐惧、想拔腿就跑的冲动，以及知晓自己无处可逃的绝望。{/n}
